recommendations.title: Wedding Unplanned
recommendations.overview: When she discovers a wedding planer's business card, Alexia instantly says, "YES" to Mathias unaware that it belongs to his mistress. The groom is now trapped between his bride, and his lover who in charge of his unwanted marriage.

recommendations.title: Cat and Dog

recommendations.title: Sahara
recommendations.overview: A young cobra and his scorpion best friend go on a journey across the Sahara desert to save a new-found love.

recommendations.title: OSS 117: Lost in Rio
recommendations.overview: In 1967, OSS 117 is sent to Brazil in order to retrieve a microfilm list of French Nazi sympathizers, only to once again unknowingly set foot into a bigger international intrigue.

recommendations.title: The Pianist
recommendations.overview: The true story of pianist Władysław Szpilman's experiences in Warsaw during the Nazi occupation. When the Jews of the city find themselves forced into a ghetto, Szpilman finds work playing in a café; and when his family is deported in 1942, he stays

recommendations.title: Brutus vs Cesar
recommendations.overview: Faced with the tyranny of Caesar who acts as absolute master over Rome, Senators Rufus and Cassius form a plot to assassinate him.

recommendations.title: Blue Bayou
recommendations.overview: As a Korean-American man raised in the Louisiana bayou works hard to make a life for his family, he must confront the ghosts of his past as he discovers that he could be deported from the only country he has ever called home.

recommendations.title: City Hunter
recommendations.overview: Nicky Larson is tasked to recover the perfume of Cupid, a perfume that would make anyone who uses it irresistible.

recommendations.title: Return
recommendations.overview: "Behind every strong man is a strong woman!", Mumine shouts as her husband is arrested. She has 4 children, she's in her mid-30s, and she's the wife of a Crimean Tatar political prisoner. Muslim Crimean Tatars have been oppressed for a long time. The

recommendations.title: The Butcher's Wife
